_The Wattersons have had a bad day, but it turns out Larry has too and it's about to get worse . . . for everyone! The Wattersons complain about their day and order a pizza from Larry. When they call to complain about their late pizza it's the final straw for Larry and he quits all of his jobs. Elmore's fragile commercial structure collapses and the citizens revert to a more primitive apocalyptic state._

_The kids complain so much they become actual charity cases. Gumball is in such a bad mood that it spreads to Darwin, who joins him in complaining about everything. How do Gumball and Darwin confess there's been a mix-up without inciting a riot?!!_

_The Wattersons set off on a relaxing vacation and end up running for their lives! The Wattersons are swapping scary stories on a family vacation, when their car breaks down in the middle of the desert. They are left with no alternative but to trust a complete stranger, whose appearance matches the scary guy in Mom's story. When the stranger brings them to a derelict gas station, just as he did in mom's made-up scary story, the Wattersons can no longer pretend the story isn't coming true . . ._

### 2014439
**Gumball S03E11 - The Fraud**  
TV-Y7-FV 🔒 11:26  
⌛ July 6, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=835928&titleid=2014439&mediaid=6593a9b4da00e054ec39034f3590dbc5f2a38adc) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-fraud-episode.html  
seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2014439` mediaid=`6593a9b4da00e054ec39034f3590dbc5f2a38adc`  
_Gumball and Darwin discover Principal Brown's diploma is a fake. When Gumball and Darwin discover his diploma is fake, Principal Brown is determined to keep their discovery a secret. He offers them all sorts of "incentives" to keep quiet but the truth is they really don't care whether the diploma is real or not. Mistaking their disinterest as "playing hard to get" Principal Brown resorts to increasingly desperate measures to ensure Gumball and Darin play ball._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014439_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2014436
**Gumball S03E08 - The Extras**  
TV-Y7-FV 🔒 11:26  
⌛ July 6, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=835928&titleid=2014436&mediaid=c084dc3b274031fc77152c4384bf0aab7d4495dc) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-extras-episode.html  
seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2014436` mediaid=`c084dc3b274031fc77152c4384bf0aab7d4495dc`  
_It's quiet a day for Gumball and Darwin and the background characters finally get their chance to shine. Nothing much is happening for Gumball and Darwin and the background characters in Elmore seize their moment. An array of diverse characters you may have noticed lurking in the background of Gumball and Darwin's adventures finally let their voices be heard. A series of sketches include some tennis crowd extras, two pizzas in love and The Bacon Guy._
